case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. RONALD FRANK MERLINO

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT MERLINO, RONALD FRANK (SBN 44580) JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
